metadata.name: tomb-startup
metadata.title: 🗿 Welcome, Tomb Keeper - Establish Your Archive

story.introduction: 🏛️ Greetings, Keeper of the Tomb! You have the sacred duty of maintaining and organizing information. Let's set up your archival system.
story.context: Tomb users focus on data storage, organization, and basic information management with enhanced security.
story.purpose: Configure storage preferences and organizational systems

variables.name: STORAGE-PRIORITY
variables.prompt: What type of information will you primarily store?
variables.help: This affects how we organize your uMEMORY structure

variables.name: BACKUP-FREQUENCY
variables.prompt: How often should we backup your data?
variables.help: Automated backups protect your archived information

variables.name: ORGANIZATION-STYLE
variables.prompt: How do you prefer to organize information?
variables.help: We'll set up templates that match your organizational style
